repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.blockchain: a Solidity ERC-20 contract, checks-effects-interactions to prevent reentrancy, gas-limit aware loops, on-chain versus off-chain storage, and Foundry adversarial tests
add input validation to a server-side form handler and write tests

retrieval_query: solidity smart contract evm gas reentrancy checks-effects-interactions erc-20 erc-721 on-chain off-chain wallet signing transaction nonce upgrade proxy ethereum web3

validation_smoke.name: code.blockchain L3 validation smoke
signals: adversarial tests pass (reentrancy, overflow, access-control bypass attempts fail)
gas usage bounded and loops cannot exceed the block gas limit
no secret or private data placed in on-chain storage
access control enforced on every state-changing and privileged function

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.blockchain diagnosis smoke
signals: state updated after an external call (reentrancy exposure)
unbounded loop over a user-growable array can exceed block gas limit
privileged function missing an access-control modifier
trusting tx.origin or an external contract's returned value for authorization
secret stored on-chain as if private storage were hidden
